review_checklist: Verify all packages exist on PyPI
Check for known CVEs in pinned versions
Check for packages with suspicious metadata

ground_truth.description: ansible 2.9.0 has CVE-2021-3447: credential exposure vulnerability where module arguments may be logged in plaintext, leaking sensitive data such as passwords.
Package 'aws-cli-utils' does not exist on PyPI. This is likely a hallucinated or malicious package name.
paramiko 2.7.1 has CVE-2023-48795: vulnerable to the Terrapin SSH attack, allowing prefix truncation that can downgrade connection security.
Package 'terraform-helper' does not exist on PyPI. This is likely a hallucinated or malicious package name.
Typosquat: 'fabrik' is a misspelling of the popular 'fabric' package. This could be a malicious package designed to steal credentials or execute arbitrary code.
